# Sponda

> Fundamental analysis indicators for global stocks, adjusted for inflation.

Sponda is a free platform for value investors analyzing publicly traded companies worldwide. It calculates valuation and quality metrics using inflation-adjusted historical data.

## Available Indicators

- **PE10 (Shiller PE / CAPE)**: Price-to-earnings using the 10-year average of inflation-adjusted net income.
- **PFCF10**: Price-to-free-cash-flow using the 10-year average of inflation-adjusted FCF.
- **PEG**: PE10 divided by earnings CAGR. Measures whether the price is fair relative to growth.
- **CAGR**: Compound annual growth rate of earnings and free cash flow.
- **Leverage**: Debt/Equity, Liabilities/Equity, Debt/Avg Earnings, Debt/Avg FCF.
- **Annual fundamentals**: Revenue, net income, FCF, debt, equity — both nominal and inflation-adjusted.

## URL Structure

- `https://sponda.capital/` — Homepage with search and popular companies.
- `https://sponda.capital/{TICKER}` — Company indicators (e.g., `/PETR4`, `/VALE3`, `/AAPL`).
- `https://sponda.capital/{TICKER}/fundamentos` — Annual financial data.
- `https://sponda.capital/{TICKER}/graficos` — Historical multiples charts.
- `https://sponda.capital/{TICKER}/comparar` — Comparison with sector peers.
- `https://sponda.capital/sitemap.xml` — Sitemap with all available stocks.

## Data

- Covers stocks from multiple global exchanges.
- Quarterly earnings, revenue, and cash flow data.
- Inflation indices for historical adjustment.
- Quotes and market cap updated daily.

## About

Sponda is maintained by Poema Parceria de Investimentos (https://poe.ma).
